_comment: Manual tier overrides after full series-by-series audit. Applied after auto-classification in scrape_opm.py. Each entry: series_num → {tier, reason}.

0603.reason: PA program accredited by ARC-PA required; no experience-only path

0610.reason: Accredited nursing education (degree, associate, or diploma) is required

0680.reason: Doctor of Dental Medicine (DMD) or DDS degree required

1102.reason: Bachelor's degree OR 24 semester hours required; both paths are education, no pure experience path

1881.reason: No education requirement; driver's license + experience only; 'degree' cue was false positive
